title: Generate avatar polls for personas missing them

log.context: Generate avatar polls for personas missing them

Here is the summary of what was done:

**Audit Results (10 eligible personas):**
- 7 had congress GIF avatars, 3 were missing (hume, pepe, ronpaul)
- 14 had commons sprites via SPRITE_SLUG_MAP, 3 were missing (hasan, pepe, ronpaul)

**What was created:**

1. **Congress GIF Avatars (64x64 animated):**
   - `pepe_a.gif` (Classic Smug), `pepe_b.gif` (Sad Doomer), `pepe_c.gif` (Comfy Blanket) at `/mnt/data/hello-world/static/avatars/`
   - `ronpaul_a.gif` (Podium Speaker), `ronpaul_b.gif` (Constitut...(truncated)
